title: Claude Cowork Sandbox Escape Flaw Lets AI Agent Read SSH Keys and Cloud Credentials From Host
sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Claude Cowork Sandbox Escape Flaw Lets AI Agent Read SSH Keys and Cloud Credenti
id: 83dd5d0b-07d8-5c84-b07d-6902e7a4f7a4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Claude Cowork Sandbox Escape Flaw Lets AI Agent Read SSH Keys and Cloud Credentials From Host (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com

tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection

detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648

        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:

    - Service account activity
level: medium
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Claude Cowork Sandbox Escape Flaw Lets AI Agent Read SSH Keys and Cloud Credentials From Host — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-24T10:31:26Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Claude Cowork Sandbox Escape Flaw Lets AI Agent Read SSH Keys and Cloud Credentials From Host", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Claude Cowork Sandbox Escape Flaw Lets AI Agent Read SSH Keys and Cloud Credentials From Host Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6082334; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-24, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
